title: Pow, Rebecca - Parliamentary Under Secretary of State at the Department for Environment, Food and Rural Affairs
body: "Ms Pow left her role at the Department for Environment, Food and Rural Affairs in July 2024.  Ambassador, CHASE Africa Ms Pow sought the Committee’s advice about taking up a commission with CHASE Africa. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in April 2025; and the appointment was announced in June 2025. An accessible version of the letter is available here.  Co-Chair, Environmental industries Association Ms Pow sought the Committee’s advice about taking up a commission with the Environmental industries Association. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in March 2025; and the appointment was announced in June 2025. An accessible version of the letter is available here.  Trustee, Hestercombe Gardens Trust  Ms Pow sought the Committee’s advice about an appointment that she had taken up with Hestercombe Gardens Trust. ACOBA refused to provide advice as a result of this breach of the Rules. An accessible version of the correspondence is available here.  ACOBA reported this breach to government. An accessible version of the correspondence is available here. "
